supersedes.fact: Organizes post-game team treats for his daughters' soccer team—never misses a single game during the spring season

required_preferences.fact: Limits open-door policy to scheduled mornings only for the next two weeks, reserving afternoons for preparation and rehearsal of the funder site evaluation presentation

Relies on a shared digital family calendar to update game/practice schedules and assign pick-up duties for weeknight soccer events

Adheres to a strict nightly schedule: CPAP machine setup, lights out at exactly 10pm, and no variability in bedtime, regardless of work or family events

persona: A mid-career nonprofit director managing grant agreements and partnerships
